instructions.instruction: Assign consistent tags to every Nx project using a stable vocabulary such as scope:* and type:* combinations.
instructions.relevant_when: Designing or auditing project configuration in an Nx monorepo.
instructions.why_given: The skill lists consistent tagging as a hard constraint and warns that boundary rules are only as strong as tag consistency.

instructions.instruction: Configure targetDefaults in nx.json with explicit dependsOn chains for build, test, and lint. Do not rely on implicit task ordering.
instructions.relevant_when: Setting up or updating nx.json for a workspace with multiple projects.
instructions.why_given: The skill requires explicit dependsOn for build/test/lint and warns that implicit ordering can hide bugs.

instructions.instruction: Configure @nx/enforce-module-boundaries in .eslintrc.json with depConstraints that encode the tag-based dependency rules.
instructions.relevant_when: Enforcing dependency boundaries between projects in an Nx workspace.
instructions.why_given: The skill provides the depConstraints pattern as the primary mechanism for boundary enforcement.

instructions.instruction: Use nx affected with explicit --base and --head flags in CI pipelines instead of nx run-many --all.
instructions.relevant_when: Defining CI workflows for an Nx monorepo.
instructions.why_given: The skill explicitly prohibits run-many --all as the default CI path and requires affected commands with explicit base/head.

instructions.instruction: Declare explicit outputs and named inputs for build, test, and lint targets; do not enable cache without specifying what is cached.
instructions.relevant_when: Configuring Nx caching for workspace targets.
instructions.why_given: The skill warns that cache enabled with no stable inputs/outputs causes stale hits or unnecessary misses.
